pages.title: Conjuration & Fetishes
pages.text: A Brazier is the tool used to perform conjuration magic, specifically to commune with the spectral dead.$(br)$(br)Once lit, the Brazier will burn for a certain amount of time. For some rites, $(l:altar/altar#altar_power)Altar Power$(/l) is required.

pages.title: Using the Brazier
pages.text: Braziers are typically placed within range of an $(l:altar/altar)Altar$(/l), filled with three ingredients and then lit with a $(item)Flint and Steel$() to produce the desired effect either as the Brazier burns, or when it is burnt.$(p)Using a $(item)Water Bottle$() or a $(item)Water Bucket$() will extinguish the flames, stopping the process.
Unfortunately, doing so will result in the loss of any ingredient in the Brazier.$(p)Lighting it when it requires altar power and has none, will just cause flame until power becomes available.

pages.secret_tooltip: This item is secret. It won't show in the book for players that didn't discover it
